milky_way.description: Approximate geometrical Galactic equator path; actual visibility depends on darkness, weather, moonlight and light pollution.

sources.name: Local PyEphem astronomical calculations
notes: Wiesmoor canonical coordinates reused from Wiesmoor Sky Observer.
Geometric horizon without terrain obstruction modelling; atmospheric pressure is set to zero to avoid refraction correction.
Constellation labels are approximate anchor points, not official boundaries.
Milky Way path is a geometrical Galactic-equator approximation.

summary.status_sentence: Sun, Mercury, Mars and more are currently above the Wiesmoor geometric horizon during day.
